'''''Mother's''''' was a [[space diner]] that orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Peekoine]] and was owned by [[Mother (suspected smuggler)|Mother]], an individual thought to have been a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. It was built out of a derelict spacedock which Mother had "found" and looked like a large platform with a small, prefab building in the middle. It was possible for [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] to either land or dock with it on its sides, and it had a passive [[Force field/Legends|force field]] that created a bubble of air over the top of the entire station; visitors could walk around on it as if it were a giant parking lot.

Mother acquired [[2X-NM]], a former [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]], and reprogrammed it as the cook [[Droid/Legends|droid]] for the station, though it was still able to defend it quite well with a set of [[Ginsu Knife|Ginsu Knives]].

Because of several "creative donations," as well as the fact that it was the only good place to get good food cheaply, Mother's was considered neutral ground between both [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime during the war, a group of Rebels came to the station to meet with another Rebel contact. Unfortunately, when they arrived, he was being chased by a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] and was shot before the droid exploded. The shot did not kill him, however; it simply sent him floating out into space. He was saved by the group before he went past the force field. The Rebel contact got out a garbled message about [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Baronis]] before lapsing into unconsciousness and being put in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]].
